Title: Materials synthesis procedure
Abstract
This local fixture describes a small, trusted synthesis note for PRD3 ingestion tests.

Procedure
1. Combine precursor A with solvent B in a sealed vial.
2. Heat the mixture at 80 C for 2 hours.
3. Cool to room temperature and collect the crystalline material.

Observations
The product formed pale yellow crystals with a uniform platelet morphology.
